message:
feat(python): numpy.fft.fftfreq wrapper parity (franken_numpy-zxdr)

Add fnp_python.fftfreq(n, d=1.0, device=None) mirroring the existing
rfftfreq wrapper: device kwarg validation, ZeroDivisionError on n=0
or d=0, then delegates to the Rust UFuncArray::fftfreq fast path so
even/odd n and arbitrary d semantics match numpy exactly without a
numpy round trip.

Covered by one pyo3 oracle test with seven scenarios: even n=8,
odd n=7, non-unit d=0.1, large d=1000, n=1 edge case, n=0 raises
ZeroDivisionError, and d=0.0 raises ZeroDivisionError. Numeric
outputs compared via numpy.allclose against np.fft.fftfreq.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
